title: CloudDash Plan Comparison — Starter, Pro, and Enterprise
content:
CloudDash offers three subscription tiers designed to scale with your team's monitoring needs. This article compares features, limits, and pricing to help you choose the right plan.

Starter — $49/month (billed annually) or $59/month (monthly): Ideal for small teams and startups monitoring a single cloud environment. Includes 1 cloud provider integration, up to 50 alert rules, 3 team seats, 7-day metric retention, 5 custom dashboards, email and Slack notifications, and community support via documentation and forums. Metric polling every 5 minutes. Does not include SSO, anomaly detection, or API write access.

Pro — $199/month (annual) or $249/month (monthly): Designed for growing engineering teams with multi-cloud infrastructure. Includes 3 cloud provider integrations (additional at $50/month each), 500 alert rules, 15 team seats (additional at $25/seat/month), 90-day metric retention, unlimited dashboards, anomaly detection, PagerDuty integration, full REST API access, log search, and email support with 24-hour response SLA. Metric polling every 2 minutes. SSO available as $100/month add-on.

Enterprise — Custom pricing starting at $999/month: For organizations requiring advanced security, compliance, and dedicated support. Includes unlimited cloud integrations, unlimited alert rules, unlimited seats, 13-month metric retention, SSO/SAML included, SCIM provisioning, audit logs, RBAC with custom roles, dedicated account manager, 1-hour critical support SLA, 99.95% uptime SLA, and optional on-premise deployment. Metric polling every 1 minute with dedicated query nodes available.

All plans include a 14-day free trial of Pro features. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle. Upgrades are prorated immediately. Annual plans receive a 17% discount compared to monthly billing.
